examples: Even the top gourmand can't eat so much food.
I like good food, does that make me a gourmand?
It is like a gourmand confessing he loves McNuggets.
It has been more than a decade since Las Vegas went from the land of all-you-can-eat buffets to a gourmand's dream.
But for the passionate gourmand, the fine dining here does not match up with that of Park City or Whistler or Aspen or Vail.
